narrative:
Cols 72-F (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,416 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.4 percentage points.
